scripts.shell:web: docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml exec web bash
scripts.shell:api: docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml exec api bash
scripts.shell:db: docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml exec db bash
scripts.shell:nginx: docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml exec nginx bash
scripts.prisma:migrate: cd apps/api && npx prisma migrate dev
scripts.dev:prisma: cd apps/api && npx prisma migrate dev && npx prisma generate
